name: io.github.VictoriaMetrics/mcp-victoriametrics
description: MCP Server for VictoriaMetrics. Provides integration with VictoriaMetrics API and documentation

environmentVariables.name: VM_INSTANCE_ENTRYPOINT
environmentVariables.description: URL to VictoriaMetrics instance (it should be root URL of vmsingle or vmselect). Use this only when VM_ENVIRONMENTS is not set.

environmentVariables.name: VM_INSTANCE_TYPE
environmentVariables.description: Type of VictoriaMetrics instance (single / cluster). Use this only when VM_ENVIRONMENTS is not set.

environmentVariables.name: VMC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key from VictoriaMetrics Cloud Console. Use this only when VM_ENVIRONMENTS is not set.

environmentVariables.name: VM_ENVIRONMENTS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of environment names exposed by this MCP server, for example demo,prod

environmentVariables.name: VM_DEFAULT_ENVIRONMENT
environmentVariables.description: Default environment used when a tool call omits env

environmentVariables.name: VM_INSTANCE_<ENV>_ENTRYPOINT
environmentVariables.description: Per-environment VictoriaMetrics entrypoint. Required for self-hosted environments.

environmentVariables.name: VM_INSTANCE_<ENV>_TYPE
environmentVariables.description: Per-environment VictoriaMetrics instance type (single / cluster). Required with VM_INSTANCE_<ENV>_ENTRYPOINT.

environmentVariables.name: VM_INSTANCE_<ENV>_BEARER_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Per-environment bearer token for VictoriaMetrics API

environmentVariables.name: VM_INSTANCE_<ENV>_HEADERS
environmentVariables.description: Per-environment custom headers as comma-separated key=value pairs

environmentVariables.name: MCP_DISABLED_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tools to disable

environmentVariables.name: MCP_DISABLE_RESOURCES
environmentVariables.description: Disable all resources (documentation tool will continue to work)
